channel.title: Speech-to-Text on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Speech-to-Text on Pi Stack

item.title: Whisper vs whisper.cpp vs Vosk: Best Self-Hosted Speech-to-Text Engines 2026
item.description: Running speech-to-text transcription in the cloud means sending your audio data to third-party servers, paying per-minute API fees, and accepting usage caps that can cripple high-volume workflows. Self-hosted transcription engines give you unlimited processing, complete data privacy, and zero per-call costs after the initial hardware investment.
